description.en: Application of the ESGE SMI risk algorithm to LNPCPs: integrates lesion location, morphology, surface/vascular pattern (NICE/JNET), and bulky features to decide between piecemeal EMR, en bloc resection, and surgical referral.

criteria.en: Recognises bulky/rectal lesions as high-risk for covert SMI with prompting.
Independently applies the SMI risk algorithm and chooses an appropriate resection strategy concordant with expert opinion ≥90 % of the time.
Decisions match histology outcomes; teaches the algorithm; manages discordant cases via MDT.
